next_suggestion: Continue dispatching remaining 12 pending derived_fixes from audit-2026-07-06-023 (H-003, H-004, H-005, M-001..M-007, L-001, L-003) — check each target file's project for git status before attempting commit
If wanxia-edit should be a git repo, user needs to `cd /home/admin/workspace/wanxia-edit && git init && git add -A && git commit -m 'initial'` before engine can manage fixes through opt-worktree

audit_findings.finding: H-001: readFileSync('/opt/personal-assistant/.env') hardcodes cross-project credential path — wanxia-edit reads personal-assistant's .env directly, coupling deployment layouts and leaking credentials across project boundaries
audit_findings.remediation: Read process.env.DEEPSEEK_API_KEY instead; env.js already injects .env into process.env at startup

audit_findings.finding: H-002: open('/opt/personal-assistant/.env') same cross-project credential coupling as H-001, Python variant
audit_findings.remediation: Prefer os.environ.get('DEEPSEEK_API_KEY'); fallback to local .env relative to __file__; remove /opt/personal-assistant/.env reference
